utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , hey , Gunther , check this out .

utterances.speaker: Gunther
utterances.text: Yeah , that ... that Chandler cracks me up .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey Ross , listen , you want anything to drink , cause I am heading up there .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh , yeah , I will take a coffee . Thanks , man .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Sure . Coffee ? Cause I am going up there .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , thank you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You guys need anything , cause I am heading up there .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: I would love an ice water .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You got it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , what are you doing ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Just being friendly .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey , honey , I do not think you are supposed to go back there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Nah , it is okay . Right , Gunther ?

utterances.speaker: Gunther
utterances.text: Do not wink at me . And put on your apron .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , but I do not see you asking any other paying customers to put on aprons .

emotion_cause.span: 16_I do not see you asking any other paying customers to put on aprons .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , do you work here ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No .

utterances.speaker: Customer
utterances.text: Hey , waiter .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ?
